HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

Static Protected Attributes

Detailed Description

Abstract base for Green's function kernels.

Responsibilities:

  • Store wavelength and wave numbers for homogeneous (k_B) or layered (k_L) media.
  • Provide a consistent polymorphic API for evaluating kernels and their RWG integrals.
  • Offer optional acceleration via an erfc lookup table (EvErfc).
  • Expose accuracy and periodic‑term switches used by some derived classes.

◆ Evaluate()

virtual dcmplx GreenF::Evaluate ( rvec r,
rvec rp )
pure virtual

Scalar Green's function \( G(\mathbf r,\mathbf r^{\prime}) \).

Parameters
rObservation point \(\mathbf r\).
rpSource point \(\mathbf r^{\prime}\).
Returns
Complex scalar \( G(\mathbf r,\mathbf r^{\prime})\).

Implemented in GreenFHom3D, GreenFHom3DPer2D, and GreenFLayered3D.

rpSource point \(\mathbf r^{\prime}\).
Returns
Complex \( 3 \times 3 \) dyad.

◆ EvErfc()

dcmplx GreenF::EvErfc ( dcmplx z)

Evaluate erfc via the 2D lookup table if available.

Parameters
zComplex argument.
Returns
erfc(z) value (from table or direct evaluation).

Falls back to direct computation cerfc(z) when thereIsNoLookupTable is true or when z lies outside the tabulated domain.

Parameters
fTesting RWG function (on observation triangle).
fpBasis RWG function (on source triangle).
Returns
Complex scalar entry of \(\mathbf D\).

const std::vector< RWGFun * > & fpvec,
std::vector< std::pair< cvec, cvec > > & DeltaKappa )
pure virtual

Compute \((\boldsymbol \delta,\boldsymbol \kappa)\) for all RWGs on a source triangle.

Parameters
rObservation point.
fpvecRWGs living on the source triangle.
DeltaKappaOutput vector of pairs \((\boldsymbol \delta,\boldsymbol \kappa)\).

std::vector< std::vector< std::pair< dcmplx, dcmplx > > > & DK )
pure virtual

Compute \(\mathbf D\) and \(\mathbf K\) for all RWG pairs on two triangles.

Parameters
fvecRWGs living on the observation triangle.
fpvecRWGs living on the source triangle.
DKOutput matrix of pairs \((D,K)\) indexed by [i][j].

Implemented in GreenFHom3D, GreenFHom3DPer2D, and GreenFLayered3D.

std::vector< std::vector< std::pair< cvec, cvec > > > & DKG )
pure virtual

Same as SameTriDK plus gradients (if provided by the GF).

Parameters
fvecRWGs on the observation triangle.
fpvecRWGs on the source triangle.
DKOutput matrix of \((D,K)\) pairs.
DKGOutput matrix of gradient pairs per entry.

Implemented in GreenFHom3D, and GreenFLayered3D.
